items.question: What is Arova Nexus?
items.answer: Arova Nexus is an AI-First IT operations platform that combines Nexus Intelligence, an automation engine, and enterprise governance to help IT teams manage infrastructure and operations tasks more efficiently.

items.question: Who is it for?
items.answer: Primarily designed for IT operations, SRE (Site Reliability Engineering), DevOps, and cloud management teams in medium to large enterprises.

items.question: Does it support on-prem deployment?
items.answer: Yes, Arova Nexus supports full on-premises deployment or private cloud deployment within a VPC, ensuring absolute data security and compliance.

items.question: What systems can it integrate with?
items.answer: Supports integration with common ITSM tools (Jira, ServiceNow), monitoring tools (Datadog, Prometheus), communication platforms (Slack, Teams), and major cloud platforms.

items.question: How long does it take to deploy Arova Nexus?
items.answer: Basic scenarios can be deployed within weeks. We take an incremental approach — start with a single use case to prove value, then expand gradually. No need to replace all existing systems at once.

items.question: Is Nexus Intelligence's AI decision-making controllable?
items.answer: Absolutely. Every Nexus Intelligence decision executes within configurable governance guardrails. You set which operations need human approval and which can run automatically. All AI actions have complete audit trails.

items.question: How do I calculate ROI?
items.answer: We offer a free ROI assessment tool. Based on your environment size, ticket volume, and team size, it calculates expected returns from deploying Arova Nexus. Typical customers see payback within 6 months.

hero.headline: Solutions for modern enterprise IT operations
hero.subtitle: Explore how Arova Nexus helps teams operate with more speed, consistency, and control, addressing key IT operations pain points.

items.title: AI-Driven IT Operations
items.pain: IT teams are overwhelmed by repetitive tickets daily, unable to focus on high-value tasks.
items.help: Arova Nexus uses Nexus Intelligence to automatically handle L1-level daily tickets such as password resets and access changes. After understanding request intent, it completes operations within governance guardrails with full audit records.
outcomes: IT staff freed for strategic tasks
Complete audit trail for every operation

items.title: Smart Deployment & Change Governance
items.pain: Manual deployment processes are cumbersome, error-prone, and lack standardized change controls.
items.help: Arova Nexus provides automated deployment workflows with built-in pre-checks, multi-level approvals, and rollback mechanisms. Every change follows a standardized process ensuring consistency and safety.

items.title: Incident Investigation & Root Cause Analysis
items.pain: When system anomalies occur, manual investigation across multiple tools is time-consuming and labor-intensive.
items.help: Nexus Intelligence automatically aggregates cross-system logs and metrics, performs intelligent correlation analysis, quickly identifies root causes, and provides recommended remediation plans.

items.title: Compliance & Access Control
items.pain: Scattered permissions management makes it difficult to meet strict compliance audit requirements.
items.help: Arova Nexus provides Just-in-Time (JIT) access control combined with automated compliance report generation, ensuring every access action is traceable and auditable.
outcomes: JIT access control eliminating idle privileges
Meeting financial and manufacturing audit requirements

items.title: Enterprise Workflow Integration
items.pain: Fragmented internal tools make it difficult to automate end-to-end IT processes.
items.help: Arova Nexus serves as a unified integration hub, using 50+ connectors and custom Webhook/APIs to break down system silos and enable cross-tool end-to-end automation.
outcomes: Breaking tool silos with unified operations portal
Significantly reduced new system integration time

hero.headline: Arova Nexus Capabilities
hero.subtitle: From Nexus Intelligence and workflow automation to integration, governance, observability, and analytics, Arova Nexus provides the core platform capabilities needed for modern enterprise IT operations.

intro.title: Core capabilities for enterprise IT operations

items.title: Nexus Intelligence
items.description: Understands user intent through natural language, dynamically plans and executes cross-system tasks. Nexus Intelligence has contextual memory for continuous learning and optimization.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Visual low-code workflow editor supporting state machines, conditional branching, and parallel execution, making complex IT process automation simple.

items.title: Integration Hub
items.description: 50+ enterprise-grade connectors with custom Webhook and API integration support, enabling bidirectional data synchronization and system integration.

items.title: Governance & Guardrails
items.description: Fine-grained RBAC permission controls, multi-level approval workflows, pre-execution safety checks ensuring every operation stays within governance frameworks.

items.title: Observability
items.description: Real-time log streaming, resource topology visualization, and system bottleneck analysis providing IT teams with comprehensive operational visibility.

items.title: Analytics & Reporting
items.description: Automated ROI dashboards, SLA achievement analysis, and custom audit reports driving data-informed operations decisions and continuous improvement.

hero.headline: Case Studies & Use Scenarios
hero.subtitle: See how leading enterprises are leveraging Arova Nexus to transform their IT operations.

items.title: Deployment Governance for a Large Financial Enterprise
items.background: A large financial institution with thousands of employees whose IT team processes dozens of application deployments weekly. Traditional manual deployment processes frequently caused service outages due to configuration errors.
items.challenge: Manual deployment processes averaged 3 days, with a 15% configuration error rate. Lacking standardized change approval mechanisms, they couldn't meet financial regulatory compliance requirements.
items.implementation: Deployed Arova Nexus automated deployment workflows with standardized pre-checks and multi-level approval mechanisms, integrated with the existing CI/CD toolchain.
outcomes: Deployment time reduced from 3 days to 2 hours
Successfully passed annual financial IT audit

items.title: Faster Incident Investigation for a Major E-commerce Platform
items.background: An e-commerce platform with over a million daily active users whose SRE team frequently faces large-scale system anomaly events, requiring manual investigation across multiple monitoring systems.
items.challenge: Average MTTR exceeded 4 hours, SRE on-call pressure was extreme, and troubleshooting experience from each incident couldn't be effectively transferred.
items.implementation: Deployed Arova Nexus AI-driven incident investigation module, automatically aggregating Datadog, Prometheus, and application logs for intelligent correlation analysis.
outcomes: Significant decrease in SRE on-call pressure

items.title: Tool Integration & Automation for a Global Manufacturer
items.background: A globally recognized manufacturing enterprise with IT infrastructure spanning multiple countries, using over 20 different IT management tools.
items.challenge: Severe tool silos existed, with L1 permission request tickets consuming 60% of IT service desk workload. New employee IT environment preparation took over a week.
items.implementation: Used Arova Nexus as the unified integration hub, connecting ServiceNow, Active Directory, Azure AD, and other core systems to build cross-tool automated workflows.
outcomes: Eliminated 80% of L1 permission request tickets
100% Day-1 IT readiness for new employees

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: Key terms and concepts in AI-driven IT operations.

items.definition: Artificial Intelligence for IT Operations — using AI and machine learning to enhance and automate IT operations processes.
Mean Time to Recovery — a key metric measuring the average time to restore a system after a failure occurs.
Configurable rules and policies that define the boundaries within which automated operations can execute, ensuring compliance and safety.
A security practice where access permissions are granted only when needed, for a limited time, minimizing the attack surface of idle privileges.
Arova Nexus's proprietary AI engine that understands intent, plans tasks, and executes cross-system operations within governance frameworks.

hero.headline: About Arova
hero.subtitle: We are dedicated to building the next generation of intelligent IT operations infrastructure for enterprises.

brandStory.title: Why we built Arova Nexus
brandStory.content:
Through years of serving enterprise IT teams, we've deeply experienced the limitations of traditional operations: fragmented tools, broken processes, and knowledge that's nearly impossible to transfer. IT teams are trapped in repetitive work, unable to focus on truly valuable strategic tasks.

We created Arova Nexus to fundamentally change this landscape. We believe AI shouldn't just be an add-on feature — it should be the core engine of IT operations. Arova Nexus integrates AI understanding, automated execution, and enterprise-grade governance into one platform, helping teams transform from reactive firefighting to proactive prevention, from manual operations to intelligence-driven workflows.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: Help enterprises build IT operations that are faster, safer, and more controllable.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: Become a foundational platform for AI-driven enterprise IT operations transformation.

security.title: Security & Privacy Commitment
security.content: Arova Nexus is built on a Secure-by-design philosophy, ensuring enterprise data security from the architecture level. It supports full on-premises deployment, keeping data within the customer's network boundary. All operations produce immutable audit logs, meeting the strictest enterprise compliance requirements.

hero.headline: Why Arova Nexus
hero.subtitle: Not all AI operations platforms are the same. Learn how Arova Nexus fundamentally differs from traditional approaches.

categories.name: vs Traditional ITSM Tools
categories.traditional: Rule-driven, requires extensive manual configuration, struggles with non-standard scenarios.
categories.arova: AI-native intent understanding, automatically adapts to new scenarios, acts autonomously within governance frameworks.

categories.name: vs DIY Automation Scripts
categories.traditional: Scattered everywhere, no governance, high maintenance cost, knowledge doesn't transfer.
categories.arova: Unified platform management, built-in approvals and auditing, AI continuously learns and optimizes.

categories.name: vs Point-Solution AIOps Tools
categories.traditional: Only solves one problem (monitoring or alerting or ticketing), cannot link processes.
categories.arova: End-to-end platform, complete closed loop from sensing to execution to governance.
